nasb.text: You also played the harlot with the Egyptians, your lustful neighbors, and multiplied your harlotry to make Me angry.

esv.text: You also played the whore with the Egyptians, your lustful neighbors, multiplying your whoring, to provoke me to anger.

cnv.text: 你也與放縱情慾的鄰居埃及人行淫，多行淫亂，惹我發怒。

ccb.text: 甚至与放纵情欲的邻邦埃及人苟合，激起我的愤怒。
